translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The elder to [the] elect lady and her children, whom I love in truth, and not I only but also all who have known the truth,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: for the truth's sake which abides in us and shall be with us to eternity.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Grace shall be with you, mercy, peace fromGod [the] Father, and from [the] Lord Jesus Christ, the Son of the Father, in truth and love.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I rejoiced greatly that I have found of thy children walking in truth, as we have received commandment from the Father.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And now I beseech thee, lady, not as writing to thee a new commandment, but that which we have had from [the] beginning, that we should love one another.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And this is love, that we should walk according to his commandments. This is the commandment, according as ye have heard from the beginning, that ye might walk in it.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For many deceivers have gone out into the world, they who do not confess Jesus Christ coming in flesh — this is the deceiver and the antichrist.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: See to yourselves, that we may not lose what we have wrought, but may receive full wages.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Whosoever goes forward and abides not in the doctrine of the Christ has notGod. He that abides in the doctrine, he has both the Father and the Son.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: If any one come to you and bring not this doctrine, do not receive him into [the] house, and greet him not;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: for he who greets him partakes in his wicked works.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Having many things to write to you, I would not with paper and ink; but hope to come to you, and to speak mouth to mouth, that our joy may be full.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The children of thine elect sister greet thee.
